title: You MUST flutter kick in combat side stroke or you cannot connect and...
description: You MUST flutter kick in combat side stroke or you cannot connect and move your hips. Kick and connect. Kick and connect. #swimming #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: Breaststroke + Side Stroke is fine. I’ve kinda seen it all. Just saw ...
description: Breaststroke + Side Stroke is fine. I’ve kinda seen it all. Just saw a sub 8:30 LCM with breaststroke/dolphin kick. Massive dude. But you want to develop a scissors kick if you need to buddy tow. W...

title: This guy has an excellent scissors kick. He just needs to connect his...
description: This guy has an excellent scissors kick. He just needs to connect his arm pull with a flutter kick while he’s rotating back over. Snap the hips, anchor that freestyle catch.  Clean up the unnecessa...

title: A really good scissor kick is arguably the most important thing when ...
description: A really good scissor kick is arguably the most important thing when it comes to swimming combat side stroke fast. It’s easy as a coach to see who has potential to be very fast - there’s no greater...

title: Rotating into the scissor kick should also solve this guy’s heel kick...
description: Rotating into the scissor kick should also solve this guy’s heel kicking of the air - while also putting his too arm in a better power pulling position. #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: If you don’t rotate in CSS, your top arm aka your money maker has lit...
description: If you don’t rotate in CSS, your top arm aka your money maker has little to no propulsion. #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: Having your arms at your side is super slow.  The bottom arm is a sma...
description: Having your arms at your side is super slow.  The bottom arm is a small scoop - palm up. Fingertips pointed to the wall not the bottom.  #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: 1. Kick inside of a box.  2. Rotate your top arm out as far as possib...
description: 1. Kick inside of a box.  2. Rotate your top arm out as far as possible. 3. Get your top arm pulling under your body.  #cssreview #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: You don’t need to switch sides every lap. It’s okay to train mostly o...
description: You don’t need to switch sides every lap. It’s okay to train mostly on your strong side - it’s typically much, much, much faster.  Don’t let me catch you switching sides in the middle of your PST… ...

title: Shorten your bottom arm. Rotate into your scissor kick to put your ri...
description: Shorten your bottom arm. Rotate into your scissor kick to put your right arm into a better pulling position. Fix mobility issues so you can kick and streamline properly.  Stop gliding. Add a flutte...

description: Replying to @scoosie the bottom arm is a short scoop. It’s like a freestyle catch with a nice power angle. A modified scull. It’s the “get the hell out of the way” arm.   I like to see the palm com...

title: If you don’t rotate, your paddle is probably out of position to prope...

title: This is an aerobic CSS set that I like to do often.  The focus should...
description: This is an aerobic CSS set that I like to do often.  The focus should be on great technique throughout the set. As the intervals drop, your power needs to go up. Your flutter kicks should increase....

title: You don’t need a lot of flutter kicks in your CSS. But you should hav...
description: You don’t need a lot of flutter kicks in your CSS. But you should have at least 1 that helps anchor your catch and snap your hips.  This clip is also a masterclass on a high elbow catch. Ledecky ca...

title: Big scissor kicks = a lot of drag.  Sometimes this is needed when bud...
description: Big scissor kicks = a lot of drag.  Sometimes this is needed when buddy towing but for normal CSS, we don’t want the knee to come to your chest like this. On the bottom leg, we need to increase the...

title: Snap those hips as you scissor kick. Use a flutter kick to snap them ...
description: Snap those hips as you scissor kick. Use a flutter kick to snap them back. Combat side stroke isn’t swim solely on your side. #swimming #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: YOU MUST ROTATE!! #combatsidestroke
description: YOU MUST ROTATE!! #combatsidestroke

title: This guy has a tiny big dawg arm. You’ll want to rotate your big dawg...
description: This guy has a tiny big dawg arm. You’ll want to rotate your big dawg arm out as far as you can reach and than use a flutter kick to drive over the barrel to really get a great arm pull. His bottom...

title: My neck hurts. Drop the chin - keep your head in a neutral position. ...
description: My neck hurts. Drop the chin - keep your head in a neutral position. Big bottom arm = hands at your side = dead in the water. Nice scissors kick, tho. #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: Don’t stop on the wall - bring your speed off of it. Touch, push off ...
description: Don’t stop on the wall - bring your speed off of it. Touch, push off on your side, rotate onto your stomach, one dolphin kick into your top arm and get moving. #swimming #combatsidestroke #navyseal...

title: Breaststroke kicking in your combat sidestroke is fine. Just don’t do...
description: Breaststroke kicking in your combat sidestroke is fine. Just don’t do it for buddy tows. Scissor is far superior when towing. #swimming #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: Sometimes we see guys kicking air like this dude. Sometimes you see a...
description: Sometimes we see guys kicking air like this dude. Sometimes you see a guys bottom arm do the same thing - breaks the surface of the water and when you pull back you’re pulling air. If we could pull...

title: I cringe every time I see a dude with straight arms out to his side. ...
description: I cringe every time I see a dude with straight arms out to his side. This is how to do breaststroke pullouts (even tho u should prolly just skip them)… From the streamline position, your arms go ou...

title: This is a perfect example why gliding during CSS is so counter produc...
description: This is a perfect example why gliding during CSS is so counter productive. He’s going way down under the water, destroying his velocity, and then he has to come back up through the water, again cre...

title: Bottom arm is sometimes called the “get the hell out of the way” arm....
description: Bottom arm is sometimes called the “get the hell out of the way” arm.  The top arm in combat sidestroke is your moneymaker.  Make your bottom arm a small scoop.  #swimming #combatsidestroke #navyse...

title: The bottom arm should be a small scoop. Palm up. Get it out of the wa...
description: The bottom arm should be a small scoop. Palm up. Get it out of the way for your big dawg arm. #swimming #combatsidestroke #navysealtraining

title: Stop gliding for 3 Mississippi - it’s slow. Don’t do pullouts. #comba...
